email_subject: Sollicitatie — Customer Service OTC UK Markets
email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service OTC UK Markets bij uw organisatie. Uw focus op operationele excellentie en internationale klantrelaties sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto beheer ik order-to-cash processen voor klantwebsites, van orderverwerking tot facturatie. Ik coördineer met sales, logistiek en finance om een vlotte afhandeling te garanderen. Mijn sterke organisatorische vaardigheden en klantgerichte aanpak stellen mij in staat om efficiënt te werken in een snelle omgeving.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Daarnaast heb ik ervaring met SAP en data-analyse tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan uw team. Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service OTC UK Markets position at your organization. Your focus on operational excellence and international customer relationships aligns perfectly with my experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage order-to-cash processes for client websites, from order processing to invoicing. I coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth handling. My strong organizational skills and customer-oriented approach enable me to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). Additionally, I have experience with SAP and data analysis tools such as Google Analytics and SEMrush.

I look forward to contributing to your team. I have attached my CV and cover letter.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Customer Service OTC UK Markets. Uw omschrijving van een middelgroot retailbedrijf dat waarde hecht aan operationele excellentie en sterke klantrelaties spreekt mij zeer aan. Mijn ervaring in orderbeheer, klantcommunicatie en coördinatie met interne afdelingen sluit naadloos aan bij deze rol.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige order-to-cash proces voor klantwebsites. Dit omvat orderverwerking, facturatie en opvolging van betalingen. Ik fungeer als aanspreekpunt voor klanten en los vragen en problemen efficiënt op. Daarnaast coördineer ik met sales, logistiek en finance om een vlotte afhandeling te garanderen. Mijn ervaring met SAP en data-analyse tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush stelt mij in staat om processen te monitoren en verbeteringen voor te stellen.

Ik ben gewend om in een snelle omgeving te werken en meerdere taken tegelijkertijd te beheren. Mijn klantgerichte aanpak en probleemoplossend vermogen zorgen ervoor dat ik zelfstandig en effectief kan werken. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen om dit verder te verbeteren).

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw organisatie en bij te dragen aan een uitstekende klantenservice voor de UK-markt. Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service OTC UK Markets position. Your description of a medium-sized retail company that values operational excellence and strong customer relationships appeals to me greatly. My experience in order management, customer communication, and coordination with internal departments aligns seamlessly with this role.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for the full order-to-cash process for client websites. This includes order processing, invoicing, and payment follow-up. I act as the point of contact for customers and resolve inquiries and issues efficiently. Additionally, I coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth handling. My experience with SAP and data analysis tools such as Google Analytics and SEMrush enables me to monitor processes and suggest improvements.

I am accustomed to working in a fast-paced environment and managing multiple tasks simultaneously. My customer-oriented approach and problem-solving skills allow me to work independently and effectively. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons to further improve).

I am motivated to apply my skills to your organization and contribute to excellent customer service for the UK market. I hope to further discuss my motivation and experience in a personal interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Full order-to-cash process management for client websites, including order processing, invoicing, and payment follow-up
- Strong coordination with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth operations
- Proficient in SAP and data analysis tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush) for monitoring and reporting
- Customer-focused with excellent communication skills in English (professional) and Turkish (native); Dutch B1 and improving
- Proven ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment, managing multiple tasks efficiently
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service · Order-to-Cash · SAP
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on experience managing the full order-to-cash process for client websites, including order processing, invoicing, payment follow-up, and customer communication. Skilled in coordinating with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth operations. Proficient in SAP and data analysis tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush). Customer-focused, organized, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment. Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch B1 and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Order-to-Cash Process: order management, invoicing, payment follow-up, documentation
- Customer Service: inquiry resolution, client communication, relationship management
- Coordination: cross-departmental collaboration (sales, logistics, finance)
- SAP: experienced user
- Data & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Additional: SEO, content management, WordPress, social media

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage full order-to-cash process for client websites: order processing, invoicing, payment follow-up
- Act as main point of contact for clients, addressing inquiries and resolving issues efficiently
- Coordinate with sales, logistics, and finance to ensure smooth operations
- Monitor order fulfilment and maintain accurate documentation
- Track performance with SAP, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Google Search Console to guide decisions
- Identify process improvements to enhance customer experience

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site; managed full project lifecycle from concept to launch
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve search visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
